'''Barison''' was a [[Water/Legends|water]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] along the [[Feena Run]] in the [[Gordian Reach/Legends|Gordian Reach]]. It supplied [[Fish/Legends|fish]], [[seafood]], and [[Kelp/Legends|kelp]] to worlds in the [[Back Reach]]. Its inhabitants were known as the [[Barisoni]]. For religious reasons, many of the Barisoni had renounced technology.<ref name="TEA" />

At one time, [[Airen Cracken/Legends|Airen Cracken]] visited Barison. His [[Droid/Legends|droid]] [[Vee Gee]] was captured by Barisoni [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] until Cracken rescued the droid using a [[Restraining bolt/Legends|restraining bolt]] deactivator.<ref name="Cracken's Rebel Field Guide sourcebook">[[Cracken's Rebel Field Guide (sourcebook)|''Cracken's Rebel Field Guide'']], 17</ref>
